top_signals.title: Nickel Hits Three-Week High on Indonesia Supply Risks, Fed View
top_signals.summary: Nickel jumped to a three-week high as expectations for Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes faded, while uncertainty over mining policy in top producer Indonesia clouded the supply outlook.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: As Ukraine Cripples Russian Refining, Global Diesel Markets Pay the Price
top_signals.summary: Since March, Ukraine has systematically dismantled Russia’s refining system, driving crude processing to its lowest level in 21 years and forcing Moscow to ban exports of gasoline, jet fuel and diesel. Russian refineries processed an average of 3.91 million barrels of crude per day in early July, according to Energy Aspects data cited by Bloomberg. That was more than 1.4 million barrels per day below the previous year’s average and the lowest national processing rate since March 2005. Ukraine has hit at least 24 of Russia’s 34…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. grocery slowdown deepens as shoppers buy fewer items, raising pressure on food companies
top_signals.summary: New data show the U.S. grocery slowdown is deepening as shoppers buy fewer items, forcing grocers and brands to compete harder on price and value.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says he needs 'cold hard' proof that AI is paying off
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said he’s looking for companies to start showing measurable financial returns from their AI investments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Cook, Economic Outlook
top_signals.summary: Speech At The Exchequer Club of Washington D.C., Washington, D.C.

top_signals.title: Commission updates its flagship Blue Book traineeship, by opening to graduates from vocational education and training
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 16 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission updated rules for its traineeship programme, establishing a single modernised framework that makes the scheme more inclusive and better aligned with Europe's skills and employment objectives.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
